commands: set -eu; bun install --frozen-lockfile; bun run build:next; mkdir -p .next/standalone/public .next/standalone/.next; cp -r public/. .next/standalone/public/; cp -r .next/static .next/standalone/.next/static

deploy.startCommand: if [ -f .next/standalone/server.js ]; then exec node .next/standalone/server.js; elif [ -f server.js ]; then exec node server.js; else echo 'server.js not found in deploy artifact' >&2; find . -maxdepth 4 -name server.js -print >&2; exit 1; fi
